name: Provenance-complete main result
requirement: Recover exact v31 provenance or train/replay a compatible main block with model, block path, SHA256, benchmark, decoding, and max-token metadata.

name: Benchmark held-out audit
requirement: Need zero exact normalized prompt overlap between the paper-scale v1k_clean benchmark and earlier core/v08/v14/v15 validation sets before calling it held-out.

name: 1k-clean main validation
requirement: Run `bash experiments/reports/aaai_main_experiment_commands.sh` and produce v1k_clean baseline/fixed/oracle/router/Always-All results.

name: Held-out conservative router
evidence: experiments/reports/v12_router/v14_full_v11_utility_router_allow_core_nolog_cv_crossval.json: delta=+0.017, fixes=5, breaks=0; experiments/reports/v12_router/v15_router_validation_v11_admitted_allow_core_nolog_cv_crossval.json: delta=+0.058, fixes=7, breaks=0
requirement: Need positive held-out router net with zero or very low breaks on at least two benchmarks.

name: External baselines
requirement: Need completed prompt-only and standard LoRA/always-on adapter results on v14, v15, and v1k_clean.

name: Consolidated ablations
requirement: Need consolidated rank/scale/admission/transfer/router ablation table generated from artifacts.

name: Statistical reporting
requirement: Need bootstrap confidence intervals for main benchmark and deployable router deltas.

name: Paper package and claim discipline
requirement: Need paper draft, claim-to-evidence map, experiment protocol, and artifact index.
